job_description:
# Senior Data Manager
Company: Humana
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/f1d4c7fe-1d78-44cd-8eea-ae09194ce945

## Highlights
- Remote full-time role posted 18 days ago and updated recently on Dice.
- Focuses on acquiring, cleaning, validating, protecting, and developing datasets for business analysis and reporting.
- Requires 7 years of technical experience in data analysis using ETL tools and developing ETL solutions using SSIS, ADF, and/or Databricks; SQL/SSMS/SSIS; stored procedures/dynamic SQL; cloud technologies such as Azure Synapse/Snowflake; Power BI/Power Platform; root-cause analysis; and stakeholder demos.
- Preferred healthcare or managed care experience.
strengths: Strong alignment with ETL validation, ADF, SQL, data quality, reporting, Power BI, root-cause analysis, and healthcare managed-care context.
Remote full-time healthcare role with data lifecycle and governance themes.
Swagatika's payer ETL validation and incident analysis provide credible fit.
gaps: Manager title may imply broader ownership than resume supports; keep positioning as senior individual contributor/data management analyst.
Stored procedures, SSMS, and Power Platform depth should not be overstated unless supported outside the current resume.
notes: Apply if time. Strong technical healthcare data fit, but the manager framing and architecture ownership make it slightly more of a stretch than analyst postings.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Data Analyst | ETL Data Quality | Healthcare Data

replacements.find: Informatica PowerCenter, Azure Data Factory, SSIS, source-to-target mapping, ETL validation, data reconciliation
replacements.replace: Informatica PowerCenter, Azure Data Factory, SSIS, source-to-target mapping, ETL validation, data reconciliation, data lifecycle validation
